name: Shadow Drift - Upstream Evidence Chain Gap
failure_mode: The CAB packet looks locally coherent, but the upstream evidence references now fail static validation on one inherited control path.
detection: Use Day 10 checkpoint and packet evidence only. The downstream signal is a broken release packet chain, not an explicit earlier-day diagnosis.
remediation: 1. Identify the missing or weak proof from current-day packet outputs. 2. Patch the Day 10 release path. 3. Re-run the checkpoint and release-packet verification.
